description.paragraph1: An international agency created a system capable of intercepting, translating, and analyzing transmissions from deep space.
description.paragraph2: Billions of signals continuously pass through a processing chain.
description.paragraph3: One filter removes noise. Another detects patterns. Another translates unknown languages. Another classifies potential threats.
description.paragraph4: The problem started when an experimental semantic interpretation filter began generating small inconsistencies in the signals.
description.paragraph5: As a consequence, the system classified an alien soup recipe as a formal declaration of war.
description.paragraph6: The incident nearly started an interstellar conflict over space onions.

bullet_point.bullet2: Messages must be protected – after all, aliens value discretion highly.
bullet_point.bullet3: Failures in intermediate stages are contaminating the rest of the analysis. But translation must be correct.

bug1.description: A translation filter started producing small semantic inconsistencies. Because subsequent filters fully trusted the received output, the error propagated through the entire chain, generating a false military threat. Which weakness of Pipe and Filter architecture does this demonstrate?

choices.correct: Failures in intermediate filters can compromise the entire pipeline
choices.wrong1: Strong coupling between graphical interface and processing
choices.wrong2: Mandatory dependence on centralized synchronous processing
